Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

Interface ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,T>

Type Parameters:
S - the type of validator returned by the methods
T - the type of the value being validated
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
BigDecimalPrecisionValidator, PrimitiveCharacterValidator, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidator<T>, PrimitiveIntegerValidator<T>, PrimitiveNumberValidator<T>, SizeValidator
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractPrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorImpl, BigDecimalPrecisionValidatorNoOp, BigDecimalScaleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorImpl, PrimitiveCharacterValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveDoubleValidatorImpl, PrimitiveFloatingPointValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveFloatValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorImpl, PrimitiveIntegerValidatorNoOp, PrimitiveNumberValidatorImpl, PrimitiveNumberValidatorNoOp, SizeValidatorImpl, SizeValidatorNoOp
public interface ExtensiblePrimitiveValidator<S,T> extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<S,T>
Validates the requirements of a value that extends a primitive type (e.g. int) but the implementing validator is not guaranteed to be a ExtensibleObjectValidator.
